Serious Mental Illness Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has a been diagnosed with a serious mental iilness. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 4/01/2012
68 A1510B_MENTL_RTRDTN_CD A1510B_MENTL_RTRDTN_CD A1510B Intellectual Disability Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has been diagnosed with an intellectual/behavioral disability. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked
